user.title: Add HOTO Smart Weight scale
user.description: Enter the scale's Bluetooth MAC address and its per-device token.

error.invalid_token: The token must be 24 hexadecimal characters (12 bytes).

init.title: HOTO Smart Weight options
init.description: After the weight stays constant for the idle timeout the integration disconnects so the scale can sleep. The reconnect cooldown is how long advertisements are then ignored before reconnecting — set it longer than the time the scale keeps advertising after a disconnect, or it will reconnect before the scale sleeps. Set the idle timeout to 0 to stay connected permanently; set the cooldown to 0 to reconnect immediately.
